$i = C \frac{dv}{dt}$
$\frac{di}{dt} = C \frac{d^2v}{dt^2}$

$v_s = 7Csv + Ls(Csv) + V$
$v_s = (7Cs + LCs^2 + 1)V$
$\frac{1}{LC} v_s = V(s^2 + \frac{R}{L}s + \frac{1}{LC})$
$12000 v_s = V(s^2 + 70s + 12000)$
$12000 v_s = \frac{d^2v}{dt^2} + 70 \frac{dv}{dt} + 12000 v$

a) $v_f(t) \Rightarrow k$
$24000 = \frac{d^2k}{dt^2} + 70 \frac{dk}{dt} + 12000K$
$24000 = 0 + 70(0) + 12000K$
$v_f(t) = 2$ V

b) $v_f(t) = At + B$
$12000(0.2t) = \frac{d^2v}{dt^2} + 70 \frac{dv}{dt} + 12000v$
$2400t = 70A + 12000At + 12000B$
$\begin{cases} 2400 = 12000A \Rightarrow A=0.2 = \frac{1}{5} \\ 70A + 12000B = 0 \Rightarrow 70 \cdot 0.2 + 12000B = 0 \Rightarrow B = -\frac{14}{12000} = -\frac{7}{6000} \end{cases}$

$v_f(t) = \frac{1}{5}t - \frac{7}{6000}$ V

c) $v_f(t) = Ae^{-Bt}$
$\frac{dv_f}{dt} = -ABe^{-Bt}$
$\frac{d^2v_f}{dt^2} = +AB^2e^{-Bt}$
$12000(1e^{-30t}) = +AB^2e^{-Bt} - 70ABe^{-Bt} + 12000Ae^{-Bt}$
$12000e^{-30t} = e^{-Bt} (AB^2 - 70AB + 12000A)$
$B=30$, $900A - 2100A + 12000A = 12000 \Rightarrow A = \frac{10}{9}$

$$ v_f(t) = \frac{10}{9} e^{-30t} V $$
